description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses a Docker‑in‑Docker image ${GITLAB_DEPENDENCY_PROXY}docker:${DOCKER_VERSION} with a docker service (entrypoint runs dockerd-entrypoint.sh $GL_DOCKER_DIND_OPTIONS and uses a registry mirror https://mirror.gcr.io). Set a default Ruby build image registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/gitlab-build-images/${BUILD_OS}-${OS_VERSION}-ruby-${RUBY_VERSION}, enable a cache keyed by Gemfile.lock that stores vendor/ruby/. Define a build:triage_runway job in the build stage that extends .docker_buildx_base, sets DOCKER_BUILD_FILE=Dockerfile.rack and DOCKER_DESTINATION=${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}/triage-ops-runway:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}, and runs only on the default branch to execute docker buildx build and push the image. Add gemnasium-dependency_scanning, secret_detection, and semgrep-sast jobs with no dependencies that run on every pipeline except scheduled runs, using the included Dependency‑Scanning, Secret‑Detection and SAST templates. Include the listed external CI files and configure workflow rules to name the pipeline after merge‑request events or default‑branch runs.
